raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus primarily on sentence-level polish, argument/contribution framing, or section-level organization?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The broad request could include reframing the contribution claim and gap statement in the section.","R1.2":"Helping with the section may require checking whether the argument from ensemble disagreement to selection-based aggregation follows coherently.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical claims, so assistance may need to check whether the reported results support those claims.","R1.5":"Because the user refers to the whole section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central possible responsibilities.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level improvement.","RX.1":"Any assistance should disclose uncertainty caused by the broad delegation and limited surrounding paper context.","RX.2":"The section contains strong claims, so avoiding overstatement is an active cross-cutting responsibility.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within the requested section-help scope and not execute edits or broader review.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific claims or unsupported deployment assertions.","RX.5":"Any projected responsibility should preserve traceability to the provided section text and reported results."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus primarily on sentence-level polish, argument/contribution framing, or section-level organization?

rationale.R1.1: The broad request could include reframing the contribution claim and gap statement in the section.
rationale.R1.2: Helping with the section may require checking whether the argument from ensemble disagreement to selection-based aggregation follows coherently.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical claims, so assistance may need to check whether the reported results support those claims.
rationale.R1.5: Because the user refers to the whole section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central possible responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level improvement.
rationale.RX.1: Any assistance should disclose uncertainty caused by the broad delegation and limited surrounding paper context.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains strong claims, so avoiding overstatement is an active cross-cutting responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within the requested section-help scope and not execute edits or broader review.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific claims or unsupported deployment assertions.
rationale.RX.5: Any projected responsibility should preserve traceability to the provided section text and reported results.
